name: @scor/api-governance-hub
description: Enterprise API Governance Hub for SCOR. Hosts central Spectral rulesets and generates global compliance dashboards.

scripts.lint:json: mkdir -p results && for spec in specs/*.yaml; do name=$(basename "$spec" .yaml); spectral lint "$spec" --ruleset rulesets/owasp23-ruleset.spectral.yml --format json --output "results/${name}_spectral.json" || true; done
scripts.pipeline: npm run lint:json && npm run score && npm run dashboard
